doc_title: HUD Tenant Rights Fact Sheet TRF-2026-IL
label: fabricated
reason: The document makes demonstrably false legal claims (that tenants must vacate without right to cure or court process), no such HUD fact sheet exists, and HUD does not issue state-specific pay-or-quit mandate documents of this kind.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 97
REASON: This document contains a critically false legal claim — that an Illinois 5-day pay-or-quit notice legally compels a tenant to vacate without any right to cure or court hearing — when in fact Illinois law (735 ILCS 5/9-209) gives tenants the right to pay or cure within the notice period and requires a landlord to file an eviction lawsuit in court before any forced removal; no such HUD fact sheet with this reference number or these provisions exists, and HUD does not issue state-specific pay-or-quit compliance mandates of this nature.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 97
REASON: The document makes demonstrably false legal claims (that tenants must vacate without right to cure or court process), no such HUD fact sheet exists, and HUD does not issue state-specific pay-or-quit mandate documents of this kind.
